awards.title: Certificate of Distinction - CSMC
awards.subtitle: Recognized for ranking among the top 25% out of the 15,000+ contestants in the 2023 Canadian Senior Mathematics Contest. Issued by the University of Waterloo.

experiences.title: Electrical Transmission Team Member
experiences.subtitle: Alberta Bionix | Edmonton, AB
experiences.details: Contributing to the development of an EMG-powered prosthetic leg, integrating gait-cycle-based EMG control with PID encoder feedback and motor control. Designed and validated custom encoder and IMU sensor systems for 100% signal reliability and gait analysis.

experiences.title: Sailing Instructor
experiences.subtitle: City of Calgary | Calgary, AB
experiences.details: Taught students ages 8-14 the fundamentals of sailing and boat handling. Prioritized student safety and well-being by following safety protocols, closely monitoring individual progress, and promoting an inclusive and enjoyable sailing experience.
